Title: Exempts school districts located within a nuclear emergency planning zone from zero-emission school bus requirements
Summary: Exempts any school district located wholly or partially within a ten-mile plume exposure pathway emergency planning zone surrounding a nuclear power facility from the requirements of only purchasing or leasing zero-emission school buses and only operating and maintaining zero-emission school buses.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to exempting school districts located within a nuclear emergency planning zone from zero-emission school bus requirements
